name: wallpaper-curator
title: Wallpaper Curator
description: Browse the Wallpaper Curator public-domain gallery, download from the real source URL, and set it as your macOS desktop wallpaper.
author: hugodemenez

commands.name: browse-wallpapers
commands.title: Browse Wallpapers
commands.description: Search the curated catalog from wallpaper-curator.vercel.app and set a wallpaper

commands.name: set-wallpaper
commands.title: Set Wallpaper from URL
commands.description: Download an image URL and set it as the desktop wallpaper (used by gallery wall deeplinks)

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: Catalog API origin. Default is production; use http://localhost:3000 while developing the site.
